previous.because: Bonsai 8B ships production-quality output at 1.15 GB by training natively in 1-bit.
previous.given: Edge LLM deployment is memory-bound; post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization caps achievable compression.
previous.so_that: Native 1-bit training becomes the default edge-LLM recipe and 1-bit Qwen/Llama derivatives ship.
previous.landing: Within ~1 quarter; open-weight Qwen + Llama family forks lead.
previous.plain_language: A 1.15 GB model already works well. Training tiny from day one beats shrinking later, so expect tiny copies of popular models soon.

updated.because: Bonsai 8B ships production-quality output at 1.15 GB by training natively in 1-bit.
updated.given: Edge LLM deployment is memory-bound; post-hoc 4/8-bit quantization caps achievable compression.
updated.so_that: Native 1-bit training becomes the default edge-LLM recipe and 1-bit Qwen/Llama derivatives ship.
updated.landing: By Q4 2026; first open-weight 1-bit-native Qwen or Llama fork ships.
updated.plain_language: A 1.15 GB model already works well. Training tiny from day one beats shrinking later, so expect tiny copies of popular models soon.

rationale: landing window updated from 'within ~1 quarter (Q3 2026)' to 'by Q4 2026' because validation rows 2026-04-22..04-26 held observed_relevance=1 with no 1-bit-native Qwen/Llama fork shipping; the original ~11-week window is too aggressive given the absence of upstream-vendor adoption signal.
